name: Tomato Bread
recipeIngredient: Thick slices of good peasant style white bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast the bread until it is just golden brown but still soft inside.
2. Rub each slice with cut fresh garlic cloves.
3. Rub each slice with a cut, ripe tomato.
4. Be careful not to moisten the bread too much.
5. Serve immediately as is or as a base for other toppings.
